creator: rsmith@xs4all.nl
text:
Created attachment 185770
plist fixes, 6th version.

(in reply to John Hein in comment #28)

I couldn't get Anton's patch to apply cleanly, so I re-created its effects and ran `make makepatch`. Losing %%FC%% was a side effect of that, I think. Should be fixed now. 

That'll teach me to be careful with `make makepatch`.
Ports are complicated. :-/
